scene_description:
### Foreground  
- **Right edge, bottom right**: A partially visible blue sedan (front section, including front wheel and part of the hood).  
- **Right mid-foreground**: A circular traffic sign mounted on a silver metal pole. The sign has a red border, blue background, and a red "X" symbol (no parking).  
- **Left edge, bottom left**: A red sedan parked parallel to the curb.  
- **Left mid-foreground**: A tall, dark metal street lamp pole with a single lamp head (positioned on the sidewalk).  

### Mid-foreground (along the road)  
- **Road surface**: A cracked asphalt road with a central white dashed line. Two parallel metal tram tracks run down the center of the road.  
- **Left side (sidewalk and curb)**: A light beige multi-story residential building with dark gray roof accents and balconies. Some windows have closed shutters or laundry hanging. A blue door/garage at ground level. Parked on the left: a silver sedan (near the blue door) and a red sedan (further down the street).  
- **Right side (sidewalk and grassy area)**: A light pink multi-story residential building with an orange lower facade. Windows have white shutters or open blinds; some balconies have laundry. A set of concrete steps (with multiple risers) leads up to the building. Adjacent to the building, a well-maintained grassy area with several tall, dense coniferous trees.  
- **Left side (further down the road)**: Additional parked cars (a white sedan and a dark-colored vehicle) are visible near the building.  

### Mid-background  
- **Center background**: A tall street lamp pole with a single lamp head, positioned on the road.  
- **Left side (distant)**: The light beige building continues into the background, with more parked cars visible.  
- **Right side (distant)**: The light pink building continues into the background, with more coniferous trees and a grassy area.  

### Background  
- **Center background**: A light-colored building with a brown roof (4–5 stories).  
- **Center background (further)**: A red-brick building (5–6 stories) with a flat roof.  
- **Center background (distant)**: Leafless deciduous trees and evergreen trees (tall, dense) are visible behind the buildings.  
- **Sky**: Overcast, gray with no visible sun.  

### Text & Signs  
- **Single traffic sign (right mid-foreground)**: Circular, red border, blue background, red "X" symbol (no text, no script).  

### Infrastructure  
- **Street lamps**: Two visible (left mid-foreground and center background). Both are tall, dark metal poles with single lamp heads.  
- **Tram tracks**: Embedded in the road, two parallel metal rails running the length of the visible road.  
- **Curb**: Concrete, gray, on the left side of the road (no painted color).  

### Vehicles & Plates  
- **Parked vehicles**: Red sedan (left edge, foreground), blue sedan (right edge, foreground), silver sedan (left mid-foreground), white sedan (left mid-background), and dark-colored vehicle (left mid-background).  
- **License plates**: All plates are small and unreadable (no discernible characters or color scheme).  
- **Driving side**: Right-hand traffic (vehicles parked on the left side of the road, indicating driving on the right).  

### Road Surface & Markings  
- **Road surface**: Cracked asphalt.  
- **Lane markings**: A single white dashed line in the center (separating two lanes). No additional lane markings.  
- **Curb**: Gray concrete on the left side (no painted color).  

### Buildings & Architecture  
- **Left building (5–6 stories)**: Beige facade with dark gray roof and window trim. Multiple windows with some balconies; ground level has a blue door/garage.  
- **Right building (5–6 stories)**: Light pink facade with an orange lower section. Windows with white shutters or open blinds; ground level has large windows.  
- **Background buildings**: Light-colored (4–5 stories, brown roof) and red-brick (5–6 stories, flat roof).  

### Vegetation & Terrain  
- **Vegetation**: Coniferous trees (tall, dense, green) on the right (near the pink building); leafless deciduous trees (distant center background). A well-maintained grassy area on the right.  
- **Terrain**: Flat (no elevation changes visible).  

*(No bollards, fire hydrants, traffic lights, guardrails, fences, or visible road name signs.)*

details.name: no parking sign
details.reason: The red X symbol on a blue background is a standard international traffic sign.
details.focused_description: The no parking sign is circular with a red border, a blue background, and a red "X" symbol in the center. It appears to be made of a rigid material, is in good condition, and has no visible text or additional markings.

details.name: tram tracks
details.reason: Embedded tram tracks are a significant indicator of urban infrastructure in specific regions.
details.focused_description: Tram tracks: two parallel metal rails embedded in the pavement on the left side of the street. The tracks are silver/gray, show signs of wear, and run along the edge of the road with some grass growing between sections. They are visible as continuous parallel lines extending into the distance.

details.name: white dashed line
details.reason: Road markings help identify driving side and regional traffic standards.
details.focused_description: A white dashed line is visible on the road surface. It consists of short, straight segments of white paint, running parallel to the direction of the road. The line appears slightly faded but distinct, with the white color contrasting against the cracked asphalt background. The material is road paint, and the condition shows some wear consistent with road markings.

details.name: street lamp pole
details.reason: The design of the metal pole and lamp head can serve as a regional clue.
details.focused_description: A tall, cylindrical metal street lamp pole, dark brown with visible rust. It supports a street lamp fixture at the top. Near the base, a small cylindrical metal attachment (resembling a box or container) is fastened to the pole. The pole stands vertically, showing signs of aging and weathering.

details.name: window shutters
details.reason: The presence of shutters is a common architectural feature in certain climates and regions.
details.focused_description: The window shutters are gray, rectangular, with a slatted texture. They are composed of three adjacent panels, made of a smooth material (likely metal or composite), and appear to be in good condition with no visible text or markings.
